message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Kubectl Request

actor kubectl
participant "K8s Auth Proxy" as K8sAuthProxy
participant "K8s API Server" as K8sAPIServer
participant Hydra

note left of kubectl
Set the correct cluster with
server pointing to the k8auth
in the kubectl config
end note

kubectl -> K8sAuthProxy : GET: https://k8s.dolittle.cloud/api/pods\nHeader: { Authentication: Bearer <token> }
K8sAuthProxy -> Hydra : GET: http://hydra.system-auth.svc.cluster.local/userinfo

alt [If good token]
  Hydra --> K8sAuthProxy : Status 200 { claims... }
  K8sAuthProxy -> K8sAPIServer : Impersonate: Hydra-User-Info\nGET: https://<local-cluster-url>/api/pods
  K8sAPIServer --> K8sAuthProxy : Status 200 (results)
  K8sAuthProxy --> kubectl : Status 200 (results)
else [If bad/no token]
  Hydra --> K8sAuthProxy : Status 401
  K8sAuthProxy --> kubectl : Status 401
end

@enduml
```
